headline: AAPL, HPQ, SNDK, WDC: Gene Munster Says 'Memory Hog' AI Will Trigger a Massive 2027 Upgrade Cycle
summary: Gene Munster says 'memory hog' AI will trigger a massive 2027 hardware upgrade cycle for unified memory, boosting AAPL, HPQ, SNDK & WDC.
